rationale: The response omits mandatory specification structure entirely (no acceptance criteria, no invariants, no test conditions, no goals/non-goals) and contradicts itself with circular cross-references: Cauchy points to Basic, Completion points to Cauchy, and Basic points to Completion, forming a cycle—plus Basic is listed as its own prerequisite.
rubric_evidence: Mathlib.Topology.UniformSpace.Cauchy — needed because uniform spaces are defined via Cauchy filters. See chapter on UniformSpace.Basic.
Mathlib.Topology.UniformSpace.Basic — the foundational definitions. See chapter on UniformSpace.Completion.
